content.text:
As of March 2026, laptop display technology is dominated by ultra-bright **Tandem OLED** and **Mini-LED** panels with high refresh rates.

| Model | Panel Type | Resolution / Refresh | Key Feature |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **MacBook Pro 16 (M5 Max)** | Mini-LED (XDR) | 3456 x 2234 / 120Hz | 1,600 nit peak; Nano-texture matte option |
| **Razer Blade 16 (2026)** | OLED (True Black 1000) | 3840 x 2400 / 240Hz | 0.03ms response; 1,000 nit sustained |
| **Samsung Galaxy Book5 Ultra** | Dynamic AMOLED 3X | 2880 x 1800 / 120Hz | Anti-reflective coating; Vivid color 3K |
| **Dell 16 Premium (DA16250)** | 4K OLED Touch | 3840 x 2400 / 120Hz | 100% DCI-P3; Best-in-class 4K productivity |
| **Lenovo Legion Pro 7i (2026)** | PureSight OLED | 2560 x 1600 / 240Hz | VESA DisplayHDR 1000; 2.5K gaming sweet spot |
